ARHU - Arts and Humanities

ARHU4339 Interdisciplinary Studies in Arts and Humanities (3 Credits) An interdisciplinary exploration of chronological, geographical or thematic topics in Arts and Humanities.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
